title: 💡 Hiring: NextGen Engineering Internship (AI, Blockchain & IoT) - Global Institute for Advanced Science and Technology Inc (GIAST)

The company is launching a hands-on global internship program desi...
description_full:
📍 Remote (Global) | 🕐 Posted 6 hours ago - April 26, 2026 | 🧑‍💻 5-month Internship Program (40 hours) | 🔗 AI + Blockchain + IoT

The company is launching a hands-on global internship program designed for Bachelor’s, Master’s, and PhD students across all engineering disciplines. Participants will build real-world Industry 4.0 projects by integrating AI, Blockchain, and IoT into scalable intelligent infrastructure systems.

📋 Responsibilities include:
- Engage in live instructor-led sessions (weekend format, 2 hours per week)
- Develop advanced skills in AI/ML, Blockchain (Solidity & smart contracts), and IoT architecture/sensor integration
- Innovate by solving real problems and building a capstone Industry 4.0 project
- Apply knowledge to create working products and scalable systems

💡 Program Highlights:
- Face-to-face live online sessions designed for working students
- Hands-on development with industry-relevant tools
- Certificate of completion upon building a demonstrable portfolio project
- Starting June 2026, 5 months duration

📩 To apply: Explore the program and enroll at www.giastusa.org. Limited seats available. Fees applicable.

🔗 Original post: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/industry4-ai-blockchain-share-7454008740464402433-_jZ8
